metadata_source: Local apt-cache binary and source metadata from the Ubuntu 24.04 repositories configured on this system, plus inspected Ubuntu source package contents unpacked under /tmp for feature verification.
selection_policy: Representative direct dependents on libjson-c5 and/or libjson-c-dev. This list is intentionally diverse rather than exhaustive.

dependents.name: BIND 9
dependents.runtime_functionality: Exposes DNS server, resolver, cache, task, and zone statistics as JSON through BIND's statistics channel.
evidence: Ubuntu package metadata shows bind9 Depends on libjson-c5 and the bind9 source package Build-Depends on libjson-c-dev.
The source configures BIND with --with-json-c, and bin/named/statschannel.c plus lib/dns/cache.c render statistics as JSON objects.

dependents.name: FRRouting
dependents.runtime_functionality: Provides JSON output for many operational and status commands, and stores some OSPF graceful-restart state in JSON files.
evidence: Ubuntu package metadata shows frr Depends on libjson-c5 and the frr source package Build-Depends on libjson-c-dev.
Source files such as bgpd/bgp_vpn.c, vrrpd/vrrp_vty.c, and zebra/zebra_mpls.c build JSON command output, while ospfd/ospf_gr.c reads and writes JSON state files.

dependents.name: Sway
dependents.runtime_functionality: Uses JSON IPC for swaymsg and swaybar state queries and events, including workspaces, outputs, inputs, seats, tree data, and bar configuration.
evidence: Ubuntu package metadata shows sway Depends on libjson-c5 and the sway source package Build-Depends on libjson-c-dev.
swaymsg/main.c parses and pretty-prints JSON IPC replies, and swaybar/ipc.c parses JSON bar configuration data.

dependents.name: GDAL
dependents.runtime_functionality: Reads and writes JSON-based geospatial formats such as GeoJSON, ESRIJSON, JSON-FG, and TopoJSON.
evidence: Ubuntu package metadata shows libgdal34t64 Depends on libjson-c5 and the gdal source package Build-Depends on libjson-c-dev.
The GDAL source registers GeoJSON, ESRIJSON, JSONFG, and TopoJSON drivers, and ogr/ogrgeometryfactory.cpp passes json-c objects into GeoJSON geometry readers.

dependents.name: nvme-cli
dependents.runtime_functionality: Produces structured JSON output for controller, namespace, subsystem, log-page, and ZNS reporting commands.
evidence: Ubuntu package metadata shows nvme-cli Depends on libjson-c5 and the nvme-cli source package Build-Depends on libjson-c-dev.
nvme-print-json.c builds JSON responses for many nvme subcommands, and util/json.c provides json-c-based numeric serialization helpers.

dependents.name: ndctl
dependents.runtime_functionality: Lists NVDIMM buses, DIMMs, regions, namespaces, firmware state, and health information as JSON for management and diagnostics.
evidence: Ubuntu package metadata shows ndctl Depends on libjson-c5 and the ndctl source package Build-Depends on libjson-c-dev.

Documentation/ndctl/ndctl-list.txt says ndctl dumps NVDIMM topology and attributes in JSON, and ndctl/list.c plus ndctl/json.c build the JSON output for buses, DIMMs, regions, namespaces, firmware, and media-error reporting.

dependents.name: daxctl
dependents.runtime_functionality: Lists Device-DAX regions, devices, and mappings as JSON for memory-device management and diagnostics.
evidence: Ubuntu package metadata shows daxctl Depends on libjson-c5 and the ndctl source package Build-Depends on libjson-c-dev.
Documentation/daxctl/daxctl-list.txt says daxctl dumps Device-DAX regions, devices, and attributes in JSON, and daxctl/list.c plus daxctl/json.c build the region, device, and mapping JSON output.

dependents.name: BlueZ Mesh Daemon
dependents.runtime_functionality: Stores and updates Bluetooth mesh provisioning, composition, key, and node configuration data in JSON files used by the mesh daemon and its bundled tools.
evidence: Ubuntu package metadata shows bluez-meshd Depends on libjson-c5 and the bluez source package Build-Depends on libjson-c-dev.
BlueZ mesh build rules link mesh components against -ljson-c, and tools/mesh-gatt/prov-db.c parses and writes the JSON provisioning database.

dependents.name: syslog-ng
dependents.runtime_functionality: Receives and sends JSON-formatted log messages and provides JSON parsing and format-json templating support.
evidence: Ubuntu package metadata shows syslog-ng-core Depends on libjson-c5 and the syslog-ng source package Build-Depends on libjson-c-dev.
The package description explicitly advertises JSON message support, and the source enables JSON support and installs libjson-plugin.so for JSON parsing and formatting.

dependents.name: ttyd
dependents.runtime_functionality: Uses JSON messages between browser and server to negotiate terminal window size, carry AuthToken data, and deliver browser/client preference objects.
evidence: Ubuntu package metadata shows ttyd Depends on libjson-c5 and the ttyd source package Build-Depends on libjson-c-dev.
src/protocol.c parses JSON messages for columns, rows, and AuthToken, and src/server.c builds JSON client preference data for the frontend.

dependents.name: tlog
dependents.runtime_functionality: Encodes recorded terminal I/O sessions as JSON, supports JSON configuration files, and replays or exports those recordings.
evidence: Ubuntu package metadata shows tlog and libtlog0 depend on libjson-c5, and the tlog source package Build-Depends on libjson-c-dev.
The package description and README state that recordings are encoded in JSON, and the source ships JSON sink, source, stream, and configuration handling under include/tlog/json_*.

dependents.name: PuREST JSON for Pure Data
dependents.runtime_functionality: Lets Pure Data patches encode and decode JSON, read and write JSON files, and exchange JSON payloads with RESTful web services.
evidence: Ubuntu package metadata shows pd-purest-json Depends on libjson-c5 and the source package Build-Depends on libjson-c-dev.
The package description says it decodes and encodes JSON, and src/json-encode.c plus src/json-decode.c implement the runtime JSON encoder and decoder objects.
